case_title: ZHIQING LI VS. KNOX OWNERS ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2025 JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LI ZHIQING IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KNOX OWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT. APPEARING ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF IS AMIN ISSA, PRESIDENT OF BOARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
STIPULATION CONTINUING HEARING FILED BY KNOX OWNERS ASSOCIATION ZHIQING, LI
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-04-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 305
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,330.00 FILED BY ZHIQING, LI AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX OWNERS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHIQING, LI AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX OWNERS ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHIQING, LI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNOX OWNERS ASSOCIATION $7,330.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,420.00, IT WAS THE ASSOCIATION'S RESPONSIBILITY TO MAINTAIN THE BOILER ROOM AND DESPITE 3 PRIOR LEAKS CAUSING DAMAGE TO UNITS BELOW AND WRITTEN NOTICE, AND DESPITE RECEIPT OF A SETTLEMENT FOR CONSTRUCTION DEFECTS, THE ASSOCIATION DID NOTHING FOR A YEAR. THIS IS GROSS NEGLIGENCE WITH THE ENTIRELY FORSEEABLE 4TH WATER LEAK TO THE UNITS BELOW IN RECKLESS DISREGARD BY ASSOCIATION OF PLUMBING CODE VIOLATION AND DEFECTIVE CONDITION OF THE BOILER ROOM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF FEB-18-2025. PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT AND DEFENDANT/APPELLANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2025 Set For Trial On Dec-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 305

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2025 Continued To Dec-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-12-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nicolas A. Rogers, Esq., Bar #248900, representing Appellant/Defendant, Knox Owners Association is present. Respondent/Plaintiff, Zhiqing Li, Pro per, is present.

Other appearances: Appellant's Witness, Amin Issa, via Zoom.
The witness is sworn.

This cause comes on calendar before Hon. Mary E. Wiss for Trial De Novo.

Ms. Li, for the Respondent, commences Opening Statement.
Mr. Roger, for the Appellant, commences Opening Statement.

Mr. Rogers calls witness Amin Issa and commences Direct Examination.
Ms. Li commences Cross Examination.
The witness is excused.

The Parties confirm with the Court that they are basing the rest of their case upon their briefings. Parties stipulate as to Ms. Li's only statement of testimony regarding the timing of her filing a personal insurance claim.

Ms. Li commences Final Argument.
Mr. Rogers commences Final Argument.

Appellant/Defendant rests // Respondent/Plaintiff rests

THE COURT TAKES THE CASE UNDER SUBMISSION

Judge: Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Not Reported. (D305)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Continued To Dec-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Continued To Sep-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Judgment Entered
